name: Sealy Cozy Rest 2-Stage Extra Firm Crib and Toddler Mattress
description:
The Sealy Cozy Rest 2-Stage Extra Firm Crib Mattress provides baby the firmness, support and comfort needed for a cozy night’s rest.
This 2-stage, grow-with-me design has been firmness and durability tested and is equipped with layers that create a firmer sleeping surface for infants and a cozier toddler side. With 150 durability tested steel coils, infants and toddlers will be supported by a resilient and durable core that lasts a lifetime. The mattress is tagged with the infant side, so it is clear which side to use with newborns. Flip the mattress after 12 months or more to the toddler side. The Sealy Cozy Rest offers a firm, flat surface infants need and the lasting quality for an active toddler.

Airy, hypoallergenic and air quality certified cushioning is used throughout so you can feel confident in the materials your baby is sleeping on. Baby crib mattress has a sustainable edge as well, as they utilize clean poly fiber yards spun from a percentage of ocean-bound water bottles that are re-engineered into firm layers that support the mattress.

Also, waterproof crib mattresses are a must-have. The Cozy Rest is made with a 100% waterproof surface reinforced with waterproof lock-stitched edging to help prevents liquids from seeping inside to avoid odors and mold inside.

An exclusive airflow pocket that allows the mattress to breathe. Sealy crib mattresses pass strict safety and quality tests that go above and beyond any standard testing, proven to pass Chemicals of High Concern to Children regulations with laboratory testing – making the Sealy baby mattress a safe sleeping surface and non toxic for babies. The mattress is designed in a modern gray and white pattern that will complement any baby nursery and the Sealy Cozy Rest is tested to fit all US-Standard size cribs and toddler beds. 10-year warranty on workmanship and materials.
Sealy is the best-selling crib mattress brand, offering incredible quality and safety features for a baby mattress you can trust. Sealy…Proud Supporter of You.


- All the materials are GREENGUARD GOLD Certified for a healthier indoor environment. The Gold standard is a strict air quality standard designed for products used with children
- Sealy Baby mattresses meet Washington State's Chemicals of High Concern to Children standards for harsh chemicals
- Passes CPSIA lead and phthalate testing; passes all federal testing and does not contain any toxic fire retardants.
- Measures 51.63"L x 27.25"W x 5.25"H – use as a baby mattress for crib or toddler mattress for bed
- Lightweight mattress weighs only 11 lb. – making it easy to change baby mattress sheets
